summary: Codebase Pack 2 - Service-Specific Dynamic Forms: Complete testing successful. All 9 service forms seeded and accessible. Backend APIs working (GET public, GET by slug, GET admin with auth, POST service-requests). Frontend pages working (ServicesHubPage, ServiceRequestPage, Admin ServiceFormsPage). Dynamic form rendering with text, textarea, select, radio, number, date field types verified. Add-ons pricing calculation correct. Service request submission working via API.

categories_tested.Public Service Forms API: 6 tests - list all, filter by category, get by slug, verify all 9 services, nonexistent slug 404
categories_tested.Admin Service Forms API: 2 tests - auth required, admin list returns all forms
categories_tested.Service Request API: 5 tests - basic creation, creation with add-ons pricing, missing form_id 400, invalid form_id 404, maintenance category request
categories_tested.Form Schema Validation: 3 tests - field types, select options, radio options

services_hub_page.title: Professional Services
services_hub_page.category_sections: All 4 found: creative, maintenance, support, copywriting

service_request_page_logo_design.form_fields: All schema fields rendered (brand_description, industry, target_audience, preferred_colors, avoided_colors, style_direction, symbols, usage, deadline)
service_request_page_logo_design.customer_contact_form: All fields present (name, company, email, country, city, address, phone)
service_request_page_logo_design.add_ons_section: 3 add-ons displayed (Tagline Copywriting, Mini Brand Guide, Express Delivery)
service_request_page_logo_design.payment_choice: Both options present (Pay now, Request quote first)
service_request_page_logo_design.order_summary: Shows base price and add-ons total

service_request_page_equipment_repair.form_fields: All maintenance fields rendered (machine_type, brand, model_number, serial_number, issue_description, problem_started, powers_on, service_mode, urgency)

admin_service_forms_page.title: Service Forms
admin_service_forms_page.service_cards: 9 cards with metadata (base price, form fields count, add-ons count)
admin_service_forms_page.feature_badges: Requires Payment, Quote Review badges displayed

features_verified: GET /api/service-forms/public returns all 9 active service forms ✓
GET /api/service-forms/admin returns all forms with admin token ✓
POST /api/service-requests creates request with customer details ✓
ServicesHubPage displays services grouped by category ✓
ServiceRequestPage renders dynamic form fields based on schema ✓
DynamicServiceForm handles text, textarea, select, radio, number, date fields ✓
Add-ons selection updates order summary total ✓
Save address checkbox present and functional ✓
Admin ServiceFormsPage displays all forms with metadata ✓
seed_data_creation: All 9 service forms seeded via seed_service_forms.py. Test service requests created during API testing.

mocked_apis.note: KwikPay payment and Resend email remain mocked from previous iterations

context_for_next_testing_agent: Codebase Pack 2 fully verified. All service forms APIs working. Dynamic form rendering verified for multiple field types (text, textarea, select, radio, number, date). Service request submission creates requests with correct pricing calculation including add-ons. Admin service forms page accessible with proper authentication. 16 backend API tests passing.
